debug_info.goal:
x y z w : ℕ
ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z
hw : 0 ≤ w
h0 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑x = 24
h1 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑y = 40
h2 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = 12
⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
let logw := Real.log w
  have hx : Real.log x = logw / 24 := by field_simp [h0]
  have hy : Real.log y = logw / 40 := by field_simp [h1]
  have hxyz : Real.log (x * y * z) = logw / 12 := by field_simp [h2]
  rw [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, hx, hy] at hxyz
  have hz : Real.log z = logw / 60 := by
    rw [add_assoc, ← add_div, ← add_div] at hxyz
    field_simp [hxyz]
    ring
  rw [hz]
  field_simp
